description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the ruby:2.4.1 Docker image and runs a before_script on every job to update apt, install locales, generate the en_US.UTF-8 locale, set LANG, LANGUAGE and LC_ALL, install bundler without documentation, and run bundle install -j $(nproc) --path vendor, caching the vendor/ruby directory. Define two jobs that run in the default test stage: a rubocop job that executes `bundle exec rake rubocop`, and a tests job that executes `bundle exec rake test`. No additional stages, artifacts, or rules are defined.
